api_info.description: SoChain Dogecoin blockchain API for querying addresses, transactions, blocks, balances, price data, and network information on the DOGE network.

conversion_info.notes: Manually created from SoChain (chain.so) API v3 documentation. Covers all 12 DOGE-specific endpoints: balance, address_summary, transactions, transaction_counts, unspent_outputs, is_valid_address, transaction, latest_blocks_summary, block, best_block_hash, price, and network_info.
